prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: When I first subscribed to the experience of waking up, I had high hopes. However, the product consistently suffers from buffering issues, often requiring multiple alarms just to get it started. The grogginess feature is overbearing and the snooze button, while a welcome addition, only delays the inevitable. The transition from "off" to "on" is often jarring and feels unrefined, as if the developers never went back to smooth out the rough edges. While waking up is ultimately a necessary utility, it's hard to recommend when the competition - sleep - is so much more enjoyable and user-friendly. Two stars.
